query:
UPDATE project_market AS pm
                SET
                    source = update.source,
                    quantity = update.quantity,
                    cost = update.cost
                FROM UNNEST(
                    $1::UUID[],
                    $2::VARCHAR[],
                    $3::INTEGER[],
                    $4::DOUBLE PRECISION[]
                ) as update(id, source, quantity, cost)
                WHERE pm.id = update.id
